summary: Parallel review: FAIL (6 critical, 15 warning, 11 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:86 — SPEC requires a fix-then-re-verify loop (max 2 rounds) for critical findings; implementation runs once and blocks finalize without attempting fixes. Acceptance criterion unmet. Add fix loop to backlog.
🟡 bin/agt.mjs — `--no-simplify` flag works via `args.includes()` but is not registered in CLI help. Undiscoverable.
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs — No test for `--no-simplify` skip path or max-rounds-escalation. SPEC acceptance criterion #9 explicitly requires both.

🔴 `tasks/*/artifacts/test-output.txt` — Test output artifacts reference phantom code (`isCodeFile`, `getChangedFiles`, `runSimplifyFixLoop`, `parseSimplifyFindings`, `test/active-task-utils.test.mjs`) that doesn't exist anywhere in the codebase. Artifacts show 611 tests with ~70 simplify-pass tests; actual code produces 14. Reviews evaluated a different implementation than what's being shipped.

🔴 `bin/lib/run.mjs:1511` — Missing fix loop (SPEC AC-3, AC-9). SPEC requires max-2-round fix-then-re-verify loop for critical findings. Implementation immediately blocks finalize with no retry. The fix loop was reviewed and tested *in the phantom artifacts* but never implemented in actual code.
🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:98` — `loadSimplicityRole()` called outside try/catch; crashes instead of failing open if role file missing
🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:39` — `getFeatureDiff` silently returns `""` on any git error via empty `catch {}`
🟡 `bin/lib/run.mjs:1507` — Guard checks `completed > 0` but not `blocked === 0`; SPEC says "after all tasks pass review"
🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:125,141` — Empty `catch {}` blocks swallow write errors silently
- **2 critical (🔴):** Missing fix-then-re-verify loop (the feature's core value prop), and STATE.json falsely marked `"completed"` with 1/15 tasks passed
- **4 warnings (🟡):** `--no-simplify` not in CLI help, missing token/cost tracking, wrong trigger condition (`completed > 0` vs "all tasks pass"), `phaseOrder` omits `"simplify"`

🟡 `SPEC.md:10` — Spec requires "fix-then-re-verify loop (max 2 rounds)" for critical findings; implementation blocks finalize outright with no fix loop. Spec is stale — update to match actual behavior or implement the loop.
🟡 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs` — No `--no-simplify` test. Flag logic in `run.mjs:1507,1517-1519` is never exercised. A regression would go undetected.
🟡 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs` — No integration test for simplify-before-finalize ordering. Claim rests on code reading, not behavioral evidence.
🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:30` — Only `main` tried for merge-base. Repos with `master`/other default branch silently skip the pass.
🔵 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs` — No test for mixed severity findings (multiple 🔴+🟡+🔵 in one dispatch).
🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:106` — Fail-open on dispatch failure has no persistent audit trail; write a skip record to `simplify-eval.md`
🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:125` — Empty `catch {}` silently discards errors writing `simplify-eval.md`; log before swallowing
🟡 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:141` — Empty `catch {}` silently discards errors writing STATE.json; log before swallowing
🔴 `bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:19` — `loadSimplicityRole()` has 1 call site (line 98), not exported or tested; inline the 2-line body

The single 🔴 is `loadSimplicityRole()`: a private function called exactly once, wrapping 2 lines of self-evident code (`readFileSync` + `trim`). Per the premature abstraction veto rule, this blocks merge. The fix is trivial — inline the body at line 98 and delete the function.
